title: HC-ARQ
short description: Haegelin Crypto ARQ (HC-ARQ) was an FSK synchronous simplex ARQ system used by the UN and International Rescue Committee. This mode has been phased out and is no longer in use.
description: **Haegelin Crypto ARQ (HC-ARQ)** was an FSK synchronous simplex ARQ system used by the UN and International Rescue Committee. This mode has been phased out and is no longer in use. HC-ARQ Operates at 240 Baud. The FSK modulation has a 200Hz shift. Uses the ITA-2 Alphabet.
